programme.title: The Three Stooges Meet Hercules
programme.desc: The Three Stooges work at Dimsel’s Drug Store where they befriend Schuyler Davis, the owner of the shop next door, who is attempting to build a time machine. With the boys “help,” the time machine transports the boys, Schuyler and his girlfriend Diane back in time to ancient Greece during the reign of the lecherous King Oedious, a distant ancestor of Dimsel. Odius has a yearning for Diane, and banishes Schuyler and the boys into servitude at sea. After a shipwreck, The Three Stooges and Schuyler escape. In the Gladiator arena, they bill Schuyler as Hercules. The real Hercules gets wind of their game and confronts them, but the Stooges convince Hercules to help them rescue Diane and return the rightful king to the throne.

programme.title: My Best Fiend
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a teenage Werner Herzog was transfixed by a film performance of the young Klaus Kinski. Years later, they would share an apartment where, in an unabated, 48 hour fit of rage, Kinski completely destroyed the bathroom. From this chaos, a violent, love-hate, profoundly creative partnership was born. In 1972, Herzog cast Kinski in Aguirre, Wrath of God. Four more films would follow. In this personal documentary, Herzog traces the often violent ups and downs of their relationship, revisiting the various locations of their films and talking to the people they worked with.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Superbloom

programme.title: Fjords & Waterfalls of Norway
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring waterfalls and fjords of Norway in this 90 minute relaxing nature film. Soar down plummeting waterfalls and over the dramatic cliffs that plunge into the blue waters of remote fjords. Glimpse historic fishing villages accessible only by boat and relax to the calming soundtrack that accompanies the inspiring scenery.

programme.title: Preview For Mountain Biking Through Slovenia's Countryside
programme.desc:
Experience the quiet beauty of Slovenia by bike in this immersive preview featuring rolling alpine meadows, traditional shepherd huts, and peaceful mountain valleys. This short film highlights scenic cycling routes through Velika Planina, one of Slovenia’s most iconic high-altitude pastures, and the lush valley surrounding Kranjska Gora, framed by the dramatic Julian Alps. From gentle gravel roads to wide-open landscapes, this journey captures the rhythm, freedom, and restorative calm of biking through Slovenia’s countryside. 🌿 This is a preview of a longer cycling and nature film. 🎬 Watch the full-length, commercial-free experience on NatureStream.tv, with access to over 100 hours of immersive 4K nature journeys from around the world. ✨ What you’ll see in this preview:
Scenic countryside cycling in Slovenia Alpine meadows, valleys, and mountain backdrops Peaceful, slow-travel visuals designed for relaxation and inspiration
🚴‍♀️ Ideal for:
Nature lovers & cyclists Travel inspiration & slow TV fans Relaxation, background ambience, or mindful viewing

programme.title: Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Journey to the rugged heart of the Montana Rockies. This cinematic exploration captures the monumental scale of Glacier’s ancient, ice-carved valleys and its iconic, turquoise alpine lakes. Watch the first light of dawn hit the jagged peaks of the Garden Wall and follow the mist as it drifts over the cedar forests of Lake McDonald. A breathtaking tribute to one of America’s most pristine and powerful wilderness sanctuaries.

programme.title: S1E2 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.
